assertions.reason: Proven by cargo test binary `embeddings_contract`: `embeddings_default_transport_decodes_base64_but_preserves_explicit_formats` passed, and the source assertions verify preserved item order/indexes, forwarded `dimensions`/`user`, default on-wire `encoding_format = base64`, decoded float output for omitted encoding, and explicit `float`/`base64` handling (tests/embeddings_contract.rs:8-90).

Proven by cargo test binary `models_contract_mock`: `retrieve_and_list_preserve_model_ids_without_inventing_pagination` passed, and the source assertions verify retrieve requests preserve raw ids in the outgoing path (`/v1/models/ft:gpt-4.1-mini:custom` and encoded whitespace variant) while `models.list()` reports `has_next_page() == false` and `next_after() == None` (tests/models_contract_mock.rs:8-51).

Proven by cargo test binary `moderations_contract`: `moderations_preserve_text_and_multimodal_input_correspondence` passed, and the source assertions verify text-array and multimodal inputs are forwarded to `/v1/moderations`, results lengths match inputs, and `flagged` plus `category_applied_input_types` stay aligned per input item (tests/moderations_contract.rs:8-77).

Proven by cargo test binary `models_contract_mock`: `delete_owned_or_denied` passed, and the source assertions verify `DELETE /v1/models/{id}`, local blank-id validation, successful deletion parsing, preserved raw outgoing id encoding, and unchanged typed 403 permission-denied plus 404 not-found errors (tests/models_contract_mock.rs:55-148).
